title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for a device that is not currently connected
scenario: Fit Test page is accessible for a device that is not currently connected to the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Tap on the device name to access Device Settings.
4. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is actively connected to the app.
5. Go to the onboarding section or user guides within the app.
6. Locate and open the Fit Test page.
7. Observe whether the Fit Test option is displayed and available to start.
expected: The Fit Test page should not be displayed or should be grayed out/unavailable when no device is actively connected to the app.
